title: Bitter Creamy Feta Cheese Crumble
description: A delicious date-night Argentinian dish featuring a bitter yet creamy feta cheese crumble that pairs well with crustaceans or any seafood.
instructions: Chop the feta cheese into small cubes.
In a mixing bowl, combine the chopped feta cheese and heavy cream. Mix well to ensure all pieces are evenly coated.
Add lemon juice and olive oil to the mixture. Stir gently until combined. The mixture should be thick but still spreadable.
Transfer the crumble to a serving plate or directly into your mouth as a snack.
